title: Add SSE, WebSocket, and Streamable-HTTP MCP transports
description: CC connectToServer (client.ts:619-960) supports 8 transport types: stdio, sse (SSEClientTransport), sse-ide, ws (WebSocketTransport), ws-ide, http (StreamableHTTPClientTransport), sdk, claudeai-proxy. OC src/mcp.rs implements only StdioTransport (line 139) and HttpTransport (plain JSON-RPC POST, line 276) — neither SSE nor WebSocket nor the MCP Streamable HTTP spec (application/json, text/event-stream multiplexed). SSE is the most common remote transport in the MCP ecosystem; its absence blocks connecting to any cloud-hosted MCP server. Required: implement SseTransport and/or StreamableHttpTransport conforming to MCP 2025-03-26 transport spec.
